title: Bump bundled krunkit from 1.3.1 to 1.3.2
body:
Bump bundled krunkit to 1.3.2, which comes with libkrun 1.19.4.

This version of libkrun includes a fix in virtio-fs on macOS for libkrun/libkrun#769 that potentially impacts podman users.

comments.body: @slp FYI our plan is to backport this to 5.8 and 6.0 and make new releases mid next week with it

> @slp FYI our plan is to backport this to 5.8 and 6.0 and make new releases mid next week with it

Sounds good!
